text: Every surface here appears deliberate, the glass and light thoughtfully arranged for contemplation. As I approach the neon-lit chamber with "R+D" boldly upon its wall, I am struck by a sense of curiosity—a pulling to explore the meanings behind these displays. The words on the screen mention confusion and obscurity, which resonates with me: in a world of invention and constant change, clarity is fleeting. Yet, I feel invigorated, as if stepping into an unfolding dialogue between human and machine, perception and reality.
